task_title: Format a LibreOffice Impress slide and change its background to red

steps.step_goal: Enter text edit mode for the bullet paragraph
action_preconditions: A slide titled Neural Network is open in LibreOffice Impress, and the bullet paragraph is visible in the main canvas.

nl_position: the bullet paragraph text box in the middle of the slide, over the word are

steps.action_before_state: The slide is in normal editing view, and the body text placeholder is not yet in text-edit mode.
action_after_effects: The body text placeholder becomes active for editing, with the cursor placed inside the paragraph and text-formatting controls shown in the sidebar.
steps.nl_explanation: Double-click the bullet paragraph to place the cursor inside the text box and begin editing it.

action_preconditions: The cursor is already inside the body text placeholder, and the paragraph is editable.
steps.action_before_state: The bullet paragraph is active in text-edit mode with the insertion point inside the text.
action_after_effects: The text in the active bullet paragraph is selected so formatting changes can be applied to it.
steps.nl_explanation: Press Ctrl+A to select the text in the active body placeholder.

steps.step_goal: Select the existing font size value
action_preconditions: The bullet paragraph remains selected, and the Character properties pane shows the current size value as 32 pt.
steps.action_before_state: The font size field contains the current size for the selected text.
action_after_effects: The current value in the font size field is highlighted so it can be replaced with a new size.
steps.nl_explanation: Press Ctrl+A to highlight the current font size value in the size field.

action_preconditions: The selected paragraph is still active, and the Character properties controls are visible on the right.

nl_position: the font size box showing 32 pt in the right-side Character properties panel

steps.action_before_state: The Character section is visible with the size control available but not yet focused for editing.
action_after_effects: The font size control gains focus and becomes ready for keyboard input.
steps.nl_explanation: Click the font size box to focus the size control for editing.

action_preconditions: The font size field is active, and its current value is selected.
steps.action_before_state: The size field is ready to accept a replacement value.
action_after_effects: The font size field now shows 12, but the new size has not yet been committed to the slide.
steps.nl_explanation: Type 12 into the active font size field to set a smaller text size.

action_preconditions: The font size box contains the newly typed value 12, and the paragraph text is still selected.
steps.action_before_state: The size field shows 12 while the selected paragraph still displays the previous text size.
action_after_effects: The new size is applied, and the selected bullet paragraph shrinks to a smaller font size.
steps.nl_explanation: Press Enter to confirm the new font size and apply it to the selected paragraph.

action_preconditions: The bullet paragraph is still selected, and the Character properties pane is visible.

nl_position: the small drop-down arrow beside the font color control in the right-side Character properties panel

steps.action_before_state: The selected paragraph is active, and the font color control is visible in the sidebar.
action_after_effects: A font color palette opens next to the color control.
steps.nl_explanation: Click the font color drop-down to open the palette for the selected text.

steps.step_goal: Change the selected text color to orange
action_preconditions: The font color palette is open, and the bullet paragraph remains selected.

nl_position: an orange color swatch near the top-left area of the opened color palette

steps.action_before_state: The palette shows multiple color swatches while the selected text is waiting for a color choice.
action_after_effects: The selected bullet paragraph changes to orange text.
steps.nl_explanation: Click the orange swatch to apply orange font color to the selected paragraph.

steps.step_goal: Exit text editing and return to slide controls
action_preconditions: The bullet text is still selected and displayed in orange.

nl_position: an empty area of the slide canvas near the upper-right side of the page

steps.action_before_state: The text box is active, and the selected orange text is still in text-edit mode.
action_after_effects: The text selection is cleared, text editing ends, and the sidebar switches back to slide-level properties.
steps.nl_explanation: Click a blank part of the slide to finish text editing and return to slide-level controls.

action_preconditions: The slide canvas is active, and no text object is currently selected.

nl_position: a blank area of the slide near the upper-right portion of the canvas

steps.action_before_state: The slide shows the edited orange bullet text on a plain background with Slide properties visible on the right.
action_after_effects: A context menu opens on the slide.
steps.nl_explanation: Right-click the slide background to open the slide context menu.

action_preconditions: The slide context menu is open on top of the canvas.

nl_position: the Slide Properties... item near the bottom of the context menu

steps.action_before_state: The context menu lists slide-related commands including Slide Properties.
action_after_effects: The Slide Properties dialog opens on the Background tab.
steps.nl_explanation: Click Slide Properties to open the dialog for changing the slide background.

action_preconditions: The Slide Properties dialog is open on the Background tab with Color mode selected.

nl_position: a bright red swatch in the top row of the color grid inside the Slide Properties dialog

steps.action_before_state: The color palette is visible in the Slide Properties dialog, and the new background preview is not yet red.
action_after_effects: The new color preview in the dialog updates to red.
steps.nl_explanation: Click the red swatch to set the slide background color to red.

action_preconditions: The Slide Properties dialog shows red as the selected new background color.

nl_position: the OK button in the bottom-right corner of the Slide Properties dialog

steps.action_before_state: The dialog remains open with the red background choice selected.
action_after_effects: The dialog closes and the slide background changes to red.
steps.nl_explanation: Click OK to apply the selected red background to the slide.

action_preconditions: The slide now shows the updated formatting, including orange body text and a red background.
steps.action_before_state: The edited slide is open in Impress with all visual changes already visible.
action_after_effects: The presentation is saved, and no visible UI change appears in the screenshot.
steps.nl_explanation: Press Ctrl+S to save the presentation with the new text formatting and red background.
